state_item.subject: User research findings - onboarding flow
state_item.body:
Summary of user research sessions (n=12):
- 8/12 users found the signup flow too long (avg 4.5 min, target <2 min)
- Social login was the most requested feature
- Progress indicator reduced perceived wait time significantly
- Users wanted to skip optional fields and fill in later

Full report with recordings in the research drive.

state_item.subject: Postgres 16 upgrade - breaking changes summary
state_item.body:
Key breaking changes in Postgres 16 that affect us:
- ICU collation now default (may affect sort order in some queries)
- pg_stat_activity columns renamed
- libpq connection string parsing stricter
- Several deprecated functions removed

Full compatibility matrix: wiki.techcorp.com/pg16-compat

state_item.subject: Resolved: High error rate on payment-service (INC-2025-048)
state_item.body:
Incident INC-2025-048 has been resolved.
Duration: 12 minutes
Impact: 3.2% of payment requests returned 500 errors
Root cause: Connection pool exhaustion due to long-running DB query
Fix: Killed runaway query, added query timeout
Postmortem scheduled: May 2
